This '''horned goat''' was a herbivorous quadruped from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Cophrigin V]].

It was distinguished by three cranial horns. Two horns curved downwards on either side of the head and one extended from the top of the head, curving back towards the tail, covering the ridged neck.

Some of these creatures could be seen grazing as [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader's]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] flew overhead when he [[Duel on Cophrigin V|arrived]] on Cophrigin 5 to eliminate [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[The Dark Woman|An'ya Kuro]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
As no official name has been given to these creatures, they are conjecturally named for their resemblance to a goat.

*{{Tales|issue1=1|issue2=2|Extinction}} {{1st}}
